title: Single cell profiling of surface carbohydrates on Bacillus cereus.
author: Wang C Ehrhardt CJ Yadavalli VK
content: S-EPMC4305413 PMC4305413 Single cell profiling of surface carbohydrates on Bacillus cereus. Cell surface carbohydrates are important to various bacterial activities and functions. It is well known that different types of Bacillus display heterogeneity of surface carbohydrate compositions
